findings.title: raga-ai-hub/RagaAI-Catalyst
findings.description: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view

findings.title: Tencent/WeKnora
findings.description: LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.

findings.title: openlit/openlit
findings.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.

findings.title: mozilla-ai/any-agent
findings.description: A single interface to use and evaluate different agent frameworks

findings.title: microsoft/AIOpsLab
findings.description: A holistic framework to enable the design, development, and evaluation of autonomous AIOps agents.

findings.title: awslabs/agent-evaluation
findings.description: A generative AI-powered framework for testing virtual agents.

findings.title: reworkd/bananalyzer
findings.description: Open source AI Agent evaluation framework for web tasks 🐒🍌

findings.title: aielte-research/HackSynth
findings.description: LLM Agent and Evaluation Framework for Autonomous Penetration Testing

findings.title: 4aibsc/4AI-Agent-Space
findings.description: Agent Space is an open-source framework that automatically selects the appropriate agent based on task requirements, executes the task, evaluates the results, and returns the result.

findings.title: sunblaze-ucb/cybergym
findings.description: CyberGym is a large-scale, high-quality cybersecurity evaluation framework designed to rigorously assess the capabilities of AI agents on real-world vulnerability analysis tasks.

findings.title: facebookresearch/aira-dojo
findings.description: AIRA-dojo: a framework for developing and evaluating AI research agents

findings.title: scabench-org/scabench
findings.description: A framework for evaluating AI audit agents using recent real-world data

findings.title: strands-agents/evals
findings.description: A comprehensive evaluation framework for AI agents and LLM applications.

findings.title: Mengmeara/agent-safe-probe-x
findings.description: ASP-X (Agent Safe Probe X) — An open-source framework for automated safety evaluation of intelligent agents, providing systematic, extensible tools for probing and assessing AI safety across diverse environments.

findings.title: AgentEvalHQ/AgentEval
findings.description: AgentEval is the comprehensive .NET toolkit for AI agent evaluation—tool usage validation, RAG quality metrics, stochastic evaluation, and model comparison—built first for Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF) and Microsoft.Extensions.AI. What RAGAS, PromptFoo and DeepEval do for Python, AgentEval does for .NET

findings.title: aws-samples/sample-getting-started-with-strands-agents-course
findings.description: Learn to build AI agents with Strands framework. Covers LLM integration via Amazon Bedrock/Anthropic, AWS service connections, tool implementation with MCP/A2A protocols, and agent evaluation using LangFuse/RAGAS.

findings.title: velocitybolt/synkro
findings.description: AI agent simulation framework

findings.title: kajogo777/the-agent-sandbox-taxonomy
findings.description: An open taxonomy and scoring framework for evaluating AI agent sandboxes: 7 defense layers, 7 threat categories, 3 evaluation dimensions, 27 "sandboxes" scored.

findings.title: Ancastal/AI-Recruitment-Agent
findings.description: A multi-agent recruitment assistant that leverages Microsoft AutoGen framework to streamline hiring processes. The system employs specialized AI agents working in concert to automate resume screening, candidate evaluation, and interview preparation.

findings.title: ibm-self-serve-assets/JudgeIt-LLM-as-a-Judge
findings.description: Automation Framework using LLM-as-a-judge to evaluate of Agentic AI, RAG, Text2SQL at scale; that is a good proxy for human judgement.
